climate.description: Typical Peak District spring: mild but changeable with rain and wind common.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 77. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 73.

course_description.character: Brutal road sportive through Peak District National Park, relentless hills with savage short pitches and long grinds, rewarded by stunning vistas and fast descents.
course_description.signature_challenge: The 'ride of heroes' long route tackling Winnats Pass, Holme Moss, and Cat and Fiddle in one day—over 10,000ft of Peak District punishment.
suffering_zones: Winnats Pass: Killer steep ramp early on, splitting medium from long routes; unrelenting gradient tests resolve.
Holme Moss: Long, enduring climb on long route; high-altitude grind after Winnats.
Cat and Fiddle: Final major test before Bakewell; iconic high road with wind exposure.
Whetstone Ridge: Long route high point; cumulative fatigue from 9500ft total ascent hits here.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Local Bakewell options; try traditional Bakewell Pudding post-ride.
logistics.transport: Bakewell Showground HQ with timed departures 06:30-07:30, pre-event questionnaire required, no day entries, feeds (1-3), chip timing, medical/mechanical support, finisher medal.

history.origin_story: Sportive revives the classic Tour of the Peak road race (1943-2005), wheel tracks of British legends like Malcolm Elliott.

final_verdict.one_liner: Peak District's savage climbs on historic roads—a true test of grit.
